# `into semver` for [conversions](/commands/categories/conversions.md)

<div class='command-title'>Convert a value to a semantic version.</div>

## Signature

```> into semver {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input  | output |
| ------ | ------ |
| string | semver |
| semver | semver |
| record | semver |
## Examples

Convert a string to a semver value
```nu
> '1.2.3' | into semver

```

Convert a string with prerelease
```nu
> '1.2.3-alpha.1+build.2' | into semver

```

Convert a record to a semver value
```nu
> {major: 1, minor: 2, patch: 3} | into semver

```
